description: Unofficial MCP server for the public PortlandMaps property/permit/zoning API. Not city-affiliated.
name: io.github.GPTNowLLC/portlandmaps-mcp

environmentVariables.description: PortlandMaps API key. Required for the /api/* tools; without it those endpoints return error payloads.
environmentVariables.name: PORTLANDMAPS_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Query-parameter name to send the API key as. Defaults to 'api_key'.
environmentVariables.name: PORTLANDMAPS_API_KEY_PARAM

environmentVariables.description: In-memory response cache TTL in milliseconds. Defaults to 3600000 (one hour).
environmentVariables.name: PORTLANDMAPS_CACHE_TTL_MS

title: PortlandMaps (Unofficial)
